reauth_confirm.description: Authentication expired for {login}. Enter the current password or continue with code confirmation if prompted.

api_unavailable.title: EIRC SPB API is unavailable
api_unavailable.description: Integration "{entry_title}" received HTTP 504 from the EIRC SPB API for {attempts} consecutive refresh attempts with a retry interval of {minutes} minutes. The integration keeps the last successful data, but it is now stale until the API recovers.
